description:
The oranges on this tree are great! Rumor has it that this tree was planted by Luther Burbank. Season: Winter-Spring

They fall but bring a pole picker because they're high up. As of 2022, they mostly just fall to the ground and nobody takes them. Or you could just come by regularly and pick the ones off the ground so they don't rot on the ground.

As of 12/24/2023, the fruit is just starting to ripen. They are green-orange to orange on the tree, and there are some on the ground already.

This tree is in the verizon parking lot.

By the way, there is a community garden at this park, too.
